title: John Gemeny II builds Pleasant View estate
description: John Gemeny II and Matilda Figg settle in Kinsale, Westmoreland County, VA, where they build 'Pleasant View' — the Gemeny family seat. The house stood on a small hill with a view across the Potomac River. It was said that 'on a clear day, one could see Piney Point, on the Maryland side.' They would raise nine children there.
